title: Initialize a Repository and Commit
description:
## Start Tracking a Project

**Requirements:**
1. Initialize a new Git repository at **`/root/myrepo`**
2. Create a file **`README.md`** inside it
3. Stage and **commit** it (at least one commit must exist)

> 💡 `git init`, then `git add`, then `git commit -m "..."`. A Git identity (user.name/email) has already been configured for you.

hints.title: Init and commit
hints.body: Initialize the repo, add a file, stage it, and make the first commit.
hints.command: cd /root/myrepo && git init && echo '# My Repo' > README.md && git add README.md && git commit -m 'initial commit'

validation.description: Checks that /root/myrepo is a Git repository with at least one commit.
